metadata.title: CatalystForge - Integrated Digital Solutions for Business
metadata.description: CatalystForge builds enterprise systems, business applications, and digital solutions for Indonesian companies.

hero.headline: Integrated Digital Solutions for Your Business Growth
hero.subheadline: We help companies build stable, secure, and scalable enterprise systems with deep local expertise in Indonesian business operations.

products.title: Solutions for Your Business
products.description: A portfolio of digital solutions designed to improve operational efficiency, customer experience, and executive decision-making.

items.name: AI Support
items.description: Smart AI & Chatbot Services to respond to customers faster and more consistently.

items.name: CRM
items.description: Customer Relationship Management to strengthen pipelines, follow-ups, and retention.

items.name: HRIS
items.description: Integrated HR & Employee System for employee data, attendance, and administration.

items.name: POS
items.description: Modern Cashier & Sales System for transactions, inventory, and branch reporting.

items.name: Company Profile
items.description: Professional Corporate Website that builds credibility and market trust.

whyChooseUs.title: A technology partner that understands corporate needs
whyChooseUs.description: We combine a consultative approach, software engineering, and long-term support so digital solutions work in daily business operations.

items.heading: End-to-End Development
items.paragraph: We support strategy, design, development, deployment, and continuous improvement.

items.heading: Local Team, Global Standards
items.paragraph: An Indonesian team with international quality standards, clear communication, and local business understanding.

items.heading: Post-Launch Support
items.paragraph: Ongoing support after launch to keep systems stable, relevant, and ready to scale.

items.heading: Enterprise Security
items.paragraph: Architecture prepared for data security, access control, audit, and corporate compliance needs.

howWeWork.title: A structured process from business needs to operations
howWeWork.description: Every project starts with clear understanding, followed by system design, phased development, and post go-live support.

steps.title: Discovery
steps.description: Understand business needs, internal processes, and success indicators.

steps.title: Design
steps.description: Design UX/UI, system architecture, data flows, and development priorities.

steps.title: Build
steps.description: Develop the solution through agile delivery with regular reviews and quality control.

steps.title: Support
steps.description: Maintain the system through maintenance, monitoring, and continuous improvement.

testimonials.title: Experience across corporate, research, and healthcare projects
testimonials.description: These projects highlight CatalystForge experience in procurement workflows, expert systems, and operational chatbot assistance.

items.name: PT Patra Drilling Contractor
items.title: Procurement HTE
items.quote: The Procurement HTE project supports more efficient procurement workflows with a key feature that simplifies document generation for every procurement process.

items.name: Al Hilal Hamzi
items.title: Student at Universitas Malikussaleh
items.quote: An expert system for diagnosing vannamei shrimp diseases using Naive Bayes and Certainty Factor methods as a knowledge-based analysis support tool.

items.name: Silfa
items.title: RS Prima Inti Medika
items.quote: Pomeng Chatbot was developed as an assistant guide to help users access directions and service information for RS Prima Inti Medika more easily.

caseStudies.title: Case studies from real business needs
caseStudies.description: Each project is summarized by its problem context, delivered solution, and intended operational impact.

items.problem: Procurement workflows require consistent documents that are easy to prepare at every stage.
items.solution: A procurement system with document generation features for each procurement process.
items.impact: Procurement teams can prepare documents faster, cleaner, and with better standardization.

items.problem: Vannamei shrimp disease diagnosis requires symptom-based analysis and confidence scoring.
items.solution: An expert system using Naive Bayes and Certainty Factor methods.
items.impact: Diagnosis analysis becomes more structured for research support and decision-making.

items.problem: Users need quick guidance to understand hospital service information and directions.
items.solution: A chatbot assistant guide that answers user information needs.
items.impact: Service information becomes easier, faster, and more user-friendly to access.

cta.headline: Ready to Take Your Business to the Next Level?
cta.subtext: Consult your company's digital needs with our team

whatsapp.label: Consult via WhatsApp
whatsapp.message: Hello CatalystForge, I want to discuss digital system needs.
